Metadata.title: Phoenix Global Holding | International trade, technology and innovation
Metadata.description: Paraguay-based group: international trade (Import and Export), technology (Developer) and corporate structuring for foreign investors (Enterprise Solution).
Metadata.keywords: holding, Paraguay, import, export, technology, AI, EAS, corporate structuring, foreign investment, RUC, international trade

JsonLd.organizationDescription: International business group based in Paraguay: international trade (Import and Export), digital technology and innovation (Developer), and corporate structuring for foreign investors (Enterprise Solution).
JsonLd.webSiteDescription: Official Phoenix Global Holding website: international trade, technology and corporate structuring in Paraguay for global investors and companies.

Hero.title: A business ecosystem built to scale trade and technology
Hero.subtitle: Phoenix Global Holding integrates international trade, technology and Paraguay-based corporate structuring for global investors—aligning operations, innovation and legal-tax efficiency.

About.title: A holding structured for sustainable growth and efficiency
About.p1: Phoenix Global Holding is an international business group focused on international trade, technology, digital innovation and international corporate structuring. Headquartered in Paraguay, it coordinates complementary companies that share infrastructure, long-term vision and operational excellence.
About.p2: The group’s structure centralizes strategic management, technology development, market expansion and access to Paraguayan jurisdiction for foreign investors, enabling each division to operate with deep specialization.

ImportExport.title: International trade anchored in Paraguay’s competitive base
ImportExport.subtitle: Import, export and direct retail—connecting markets while optimizing logistics and commercial efficiency across the region.
ImportExport.importDesc: Imports from global markets with emphasis on high value-added categories: electronics and technology, digital devices and accessories, cosmetics and dermocosmetics, consumer and lifestyle products.
ImportExport.exportDesc: Export, regional redistribution and logistics integration across South America, including cross-border trade and support for international operations.
ImportExport.localDesc: Local go-to-market through distribution, DTC, e-commerce and marketplaces—with speed and competitive positioning.

Developer.title: World-class technology, AI and digital infrastructure
Developer.subtitle: The group’s technology division builds platforms, applications and systems that power businesses and the holding’s own operations.
Developer.aiDesc: Process automation, data intelligence, enterprise AI systems and integration of advanced models.
Developer.appsDesc: Mobile apps, web platforms and tailored digital systems for consumers, enterprises and digital initiatives.
Developer.infraDesc: Enterprise systems, digital platforms, marketplace infrastructure, operational automation and API/service integration.

EnterpriseSolution.title: International corporate structuring through Paraguay—without relocating
EnterpriseSolution.subtitle: We incorporate and activate companies in Paraguay for foreign investors and entrepreneurs, with fully remote management and a sharp focus on legal, tax and operational efficiency.
EnterpriseSolution.positioningEn: Corporate structuring and business gateway to Paraguay.
EnterpriseSolution.positioningCaption: Market positioning—a gateway for international operators seeking efficient South American expansion.
valueProps: Operate internationally from a streamlined, predictable jurisdiction.
Reduce operational bureaucracy with end-to-end guided processes.
Access a competitive tax environment aligned with local regulations.
Structure high-margin businesses with tax efficiency.
No Paraguay residency or in-person handling required—full support from our team.

serviceBlocks.title: Company structuring
items: Incorporation of an EAS (Empresa por Acciones Simplificada).

serviceBlocks.title: Administrative backbone
items: Support for corporate bank account opening.

serviceBlocks.title: Remote operation
items: Powers of attorney and local representation.

audiences: Brazilian and Latin American entrepreneurs optimizing tax burden through lawful structures.
Technology and digital services companies with regional or global operations.
Importers and exporters requiring a Paraguayan corporate vehicle.
Consultants and foreign investors structuring regional vehicles.

diffItems.remote: Fully remote process—no need to relocate.
diffItems.speed: Incorporation and activation on competitive timelines (subject to case complexity).
diffItems.jurisdiction: Stable jurisdiction and a modern corporate framework.
diffItems.tax: Competitive taxation within the applicable legal order.
diffItems.eas: Modern vehicle: EAS with clear corporate governance.

EnterpriseSolution.institutional: Phoenix Global Enterprise Solution is a corporate structuring firm specialized in helping international entrepreneurs establish and operate companies in Paraguay remotely. Through a streamlined legal and operational process, we enable foreign investors to access Paraguay’s efficient business environment, competitive tax structure and low bureaucratic barriers—without the need to relocate or manage complex local procedures alone. Our mission is to provide a seamless gateway for global businesses seeking strategic expansion in South America, in coordination with the broader Phoenix Global Holding ecosystem.

Integration.title: Integrating trade, technology and corporate structure
Integration.subtitle: Developer and Enterprise Solution capabilities strengthen Import and Export and the wider group—automation, platforms, Paraguayan vehicles and smoother regional scale-up.

items.platforms: Digital platforms, e-commerce and proprietary systems
items.logistics: Integrated logistics, commercial and tax optimisation
items.expansion: South American expansion with aligned corporate and technology rails

Vision.title: A modern, scalable ecosystem connected to the world
Vision.text: Build a business ecosystem that connects international trade, technology, digital innovation and international corporate structuring—expanding across Latin America while offering global investors an efficient Paraguay gateway.

Contact.title: Paraguay as a hub. Connected globally.
Contact.subtitle: For commercial alliances, technology projects, Paraguay corporate structuring or institutional inquiries, our team evaluates each opportunity with a strategic lens.
